cases.prompt: I need to install and configure Laravel Reverb for real-time WebSocket communication in our app.
cases.expect: reverb-setup skill activates and guides through installing laravel/reverb, configuring environment variables, and setting up Echo client.

cases.prompt: Set up Reverb with Supervisor for production and enable Redis scaling across multiple servers.
cases.expect: reverb-setup skill activates and covers Reverb installation, Redis scaling config, and Supervisor process management setup.
